nasb.text: Moreover, he did not humble himself before the Lord as his father Manasseh had done, but Amon multiplied guilt.

esv.text: And he did not humble himself before the Lord, as Manasseh his father had humbled himself, but this Amon incurred guilt more and more.

cnv.text: 他沒有在耶和華面前謙卑，像他父親瑪拿西謙卑一樣；這亞們所犯的罪過越來越多。

ccb.text: 可是，亚们没有像他父亲玛拿西一样在耶和华面前谦卑下来。相反，他犯的罪日益增加。
